summary:
Step 3 'Expected a section titled 'Simulate failure' (or similar) to be visible on the page.' failed. Error: TEST BLOCKED

The test could not be run — the UI requires Vercel authentication which prevents reaching the ChatDock builder and running the resilience simulation.

Observations:
- The page shows 'Log in to Vercel' with an email input and provider sign-in buttons.
- No ChatDock builder UI or the 'Continue as judge — use demo tenant' button is visible on the page.
- Access is redirected to Vercel SSO and no credentials were provided to authenticate.
